labels.9: Sports scores in win-loss record format (e.g., "2-1", "30-1", "14-13").

labels.6257: Phone number area codes or first digits appearing before the main phone number.

labels.6435: The feature activates on tokens in interrogative constructions, particularly "How" questions and their immediate context asking about manner, means, or extent.

labels.6559: Feature activates on transitions between noun phrases or list items, particularly when moving from one concept to another.
